title: AuditEvent
description: Protocol-owned audit event family for typed, hash-linked, signed, schema-versioned event records with optional gateway context and related-object hash references.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for audit events.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this audit event.

audit_event_type.description: Machine-consumed audit event classification value from the audit_event_type registry. Runtime enforcement must validate this value against the active audit_event_type registry.

seq.description: Strictly monotonic per-signer sequence number for this audit event.

occurred_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when the audited event occurred. Verification uses seq for integrity and treats wall-clock time as advisory metadata.

principal.description: Principal identity for the signer or actor that emitted the audit event.

previous_event_hash.description: Hash of the previous audit event in this signer's append-only chain, when one exists.

manifest_hash.description: Hash of the active manifest context bound to the audited event, when applicable.

event_payload_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for the typed event payload carried by this audit event.

event_payload.description: Typed event payload whose shape is defined by event_payload_schema_id.

event_payload_hash.description: Hash of the canonical event payload bytes used for verification and receipt linkage.

related_artifact_hashes.description: Artifact hashes materially related to this event.

items.description: Hash of one artifact related to this audit event.

related_principal_hashes.description: Hashes of additional principal-identity objects related to this event beyond the emitting principal.

items.description: Hash of one related principal-identity object.

related_decision_hashes.description: Hashes of approval, policy, or other decision objects related to this event.

items.description: Hash of one related decision object.

related_receipt_hashes.description: Hashes of related audit, provenance, or approval receipts associated with this event.

items.description: Hash of one related receipt object.

egress_category.description: Gateway egress category associated with this event.

allowlist_ref.description: Hash reference for the allowlist input governing the gateway destination.

destination_descriptor.description: Stable non-secret descriptor for the gateway destination used during the audited event.

gateway_context.description: Optional gateway-role metadata for outbound network events.

schema_bundle_version.description: Exact schema bundle version used by the emitting component or client. Session-open events record this for same-bundle runtime verification.

signatures.description: Detached signatures attesting to the audit event contents.

items.description: Detached signature block for the audit event payload.
